title: meaning of nervs quote and seeles
display_title: meaning of nervs quote and seeles
wikitext:
[]: meaning of nervs quote and seele's             Quote Post by my bff is katy perry » Fri Dec 18, 2009 1:04 pm I've been wondering what is meant by gods in his heaven alls right with the world and under seele's new symbol there is german that (might not be word for word) says up in the starry sky god judges, as we judge.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 18, 2009 1:21 pm http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pippa_Passes and http://www.recmusic.org/lieder/get_text.html?TextId=21644

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Sat Dec 19, 2009 6:54 pm I link Seele's quote to their goal to be faithful to the dead sea scrolls and recieve their blessings. Nerv's links to how second impact "purified" the world, or it could be sarcasm. Thats my guess for now, but could change.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Dec 20, 2009 10:30 am konfunoodle wrote: I link Seele's quote to their goal to be faithful to the dead sea scrolls and recieve their blessings. Nerv's links to how second impact "purified" the world, or it could be sarcasm. Thats my guess for now, but could change.

[]:             Quote Post by zilluss » Sun Dec 20, 2009 11:07 am Ode to Joy = Come together everybody (Just what Seele wants to accomplish with Instumentality)

[]:             Quote Post by Sun Stealer » Sun Dec 20, 2009 10:13 pm Well Shinji is a lot like the main character from It's A Wonderful Life and that is the only other movie where I have seen the line "God's in his Heaven, and all's right with the World."

[]: Re: meaning of nervs quote and seele's             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Dec 22, 2009 5:47 am my bff is katy perry wrote: I've been wondering what is meant by gods in his heaven alls right with the world
